title: Arithmetic logic unit (alu) -centric operations in graphics processing units (gpus)
abstract: A GPU comprises: a GPR comprising registers; an L1 cache coupled to the GPR and configured to implement a pixel mapping by: segregating pixels of an image into regions, the regions comprise a first region and a second region, the first region comprises first pixels, and the second region comprises second pixels, loading the first pixels into the GPR in a horizontal manner, and loading the second pixels into the GPR in a vertical manner; and an ALU configured to read the first pixels and the second pixels independently of a shared memory.
claims: Claims ( 20 ) AĂ‚Â graphicsĂ‚Â processingĂ‚Â unitĂ‚Â (GPU)Ă‚Â comprising: aĂ‚Â generalĂ‚Â purposeĂ‚Â registerĂ‚Â (GPR)Ă‚Â comprisingĂ‚Â registers; aĂ‚Â levelĂ‚Â 1Ă‚Â (L1)Ă‚Â cacheĂ‚Â coupledĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â GPRĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â configuredĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â implementĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â pixelĂ‚Â mappingĂ‚Â by: segregatingĂ‚Â pixelsĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â intoĂ‚Â regions,Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â regionsĂ‚Â compriseĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â regionĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â region,Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â regionĂ‚Â comprisesĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â pixels,Ă‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â regionĂ‚Â comprisesĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â pixels, loadingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â pixelsĂ‚Â intoĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â GPRĂ‚Â inĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â horizontalĂ‚Â manner,Ă‚Â and loadingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â pixelsĂ‚Â intoĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â GPRĂ‚Â inĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â verticalĂ‚Â manner;Ă‚Â and anĂ‚Â arithmeticĂ‚Â logicĂ‚Â unitĂ‚Â (ALU)Ă‚Â configuredĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â readĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â pixelsĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â pixelsĂ‚Â independentlyĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â sharedĂ‚Â memory. TheĂ‚Â GPUĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â claimĂ‚Â 1,Ă‚Â whereinĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â regionsĂ‚Â compriseĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â thirdĂ‚Â regionĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â thirdĂ‚Â pixels,Ă‚Â andĂ‚Â whereinĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â L1Ă‚Â cacheĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â furtherĂ‚Â configuredĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â implementĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â pixelĂ‚Â mappingĂ‚Â byĂ‚Â loadingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â thirdĂ‚Â pixelsĂ‚Â intoĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â GPRĂ‚Â inĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â horizontalĂ‚Â manner. TheĂ‚Â GPUĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â anyĂ‚Â oneĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â claimsĂ‚Â 1-2,Ă‚Â whereinĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â pixelsĂ‚Â areĂ‚Â startingĂ‚Â pixels,Ă‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â pixelsĂ‚Â areĂ‚Â rightĂ‚Â paddingĂ‚Â pixels,Ă‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â thirdĂ‚Â pixelsĂ‚Â areĂ‚Â bottomĂ‚Â paddingĂ‚Â pixels. TheĂ‚Â GPUĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â anyĂ‚Â oneĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â claimsĂ‚Â 1-3,Ă‚Â whereinĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â registersĂ‚Â compriseĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â anchorĂ‚Â register,Ă‚Â andĂ‚Â whereinĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â L1Ă‚Â cacheĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â furtherĂ‚Â configuredĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â implementĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â pixelĂ‚Â mappingĂ‚Â byĂ‚Â furtherĂ‚Â loadingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â firstĂ‚Â pixelsĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â secondĂ‚Â pixelsĂ‚Â beginningĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â anchorĂ‚Â registerĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â basedĂ‚Â onĂ‚Â fixedĂ‚Â offsets.
